channel.title: Eggnog on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Eggnog on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: Eggnog Latte Recipe (Better Than Starbucks)
item.description: Make a creamy, spiced eggnog latte at home — hot or iced — with store-bought or homemade eggnog. The ultimate holiday coffee drink with step-by-step instructions.
